lessons.title: What is an Array?
lessons.description: Store multiple values in a single variable.

lessons.title: Indexed Arrays
lessons.description: Work with arrays that use numeric keys.

lessons.title: Associative Arrays
lessons.description: Use named keys to store key-value pairs.

lessons.title: Array Functions: Adding and Removing
lessons.description: Use functions like array_push, array_pop, array_shift, array_unshift.

lessons.title: Array Functions: Sorting
lessons.description: Sort arrays with sort, rsort, asort, ksort, etc.

lessons.title: Array Functions: Merging, Slicing, and More
lessons.description: Combine arrays, extract slices, and check existence.
